To our valued customers.

The Sampling Lounge and Museum at our St James's Street store will be closed for refurbishment from Monday 20th April until Thursday 7th May. Our store will be open as usual, and our Sampling Lounge at Harrods remains open.

 We apologise for the inconvenience caused.

        The untold story of Winston Churchill's precarious finances – and the most original and surprising book about Churchill to emerge for many years.

      • The Perfect Accessory

        Classic styles and superb functionality is what you can expect from our cutters. Take a look at our selection of Colibri, S.T. Dupont and Xikar cutters - the perfect cigar accessory.

      Blog / Events / Social

      The Fox Press - Blog

      The Fox Press is the place where we talk about the world of cigars, pipes, smoker’s accessories, and even luxury spirits and goods. We believe cigars are an important commodity in the world of luxury, and this is evident with the demand far outweighing the supply for the most sought-after cigars and brands. We inform, review and deliver the news from all three of our shops (19 St James’s Street – James J Fox Flagship, La Casa del Habano James J Fox – Harrods, The Cigar Room – Selfridges) as we let you know the going-ons of James J Fox.

      Read More
      Events

      Our Sampling Evenings are one of London’s hidden gems of a night out. It doesn’t matter whether you’re a cigar novice or cigar aficionado, we welcome all to join us at 19 St James’s Street for a cigar and drink pairing of the highest order. One of our connoisseurs joins our guests along with an ambassador representing the drink company to produce a wonderful evening of cigars, drinks and, most importantly, engaging conversations that derives from the pairing. Whether it is St James’s or LCDH James J Fox in Harrods, our events are not to be missed.

      Read More
      Social Media

      The place to get close-to-real-time communications on new releases and news from James J Fox. In between, we post lifestyle-inspired images to help you get through the week and/or to stimulate you to delve into your humidor (or ours) to find something you want. Event information will pop-up, new video reviews on YouTube and much more across three IG channels for our three shops, Facebook and YouTube.

      * Please note our website prices vary from our prices in stores.

      Experienced Tobacconists & Suppliers of Cigars Online

      We have been trading in fine tobacco and smokers' accessories from 19 St James's Street for over 235 years and our customers have included discriminating smokers from all walks of life – from commoners to kings. Among them have been Sir Winston Churchill, Oscar Wilde, British and Foreign Royalty, the officer's mess of famous British regiments, and the leading lights of the stage, film, sport, tv, radio, music and literature.

      Our world famous tobacco business started with Robert Lewis, who began trading fine tobacco in St James's Street in 1787. James J Fox was formed in Dublin in 1881 and opened its first tobacco shop in London in 1947. Fox acquired the business of Robert Lewis on 14 September 1992, uniting two of the most respected names in the cigar world. Both companies now trade as JJ Fox (St James's) Ltd and run the cigar departments of Harrods and Selfridges, in addition to selling large and small cigars online. Buy Cuban cigars online from world famous top cigar brands such as Cohiba and Hoyo De Monterrey, and choose to complement them with a pairing of premium accessories, such as cigar humidors, cigar cases and S. T. Dupont lighters and cutters. Browse our entire range and order online or in store today.
